query: My Micro 820 won't talk to the GS10 over RS-485 — it builds fine and the PLC is in Run, but the drive never answers. I think the read is using a MSG_MODBUS2 block. What's wrong?

can you review this Prog_VFD.stf — is the round-robin poll scheduler and the COP into the write buffer set up correctly for a Micro820?
how do I configure the embedded serial port on the micro 820 in CCW for modbus RTU master to the gs10 — what baud/parity/stop bits?

set up the modbus tcp server map on the micro820 so my live monitor can read conv_state and the vfd frequency over ethernet

scan my plant network and tell me what PLCs and VFDs are on it
is the GS10 even talking on the bus? just find it and report its baud and parity, don't change anything
what's on this RS-485 segment? do a read-only sweep and list the device addresses

help me wire the GS10 power terminals and the motor leads — which terminal is which?
draft a maintenance work order for the conveyor motor bearing that's been getting hot
